replies.msg:
Dear Disney Movies,

I’m such a big fan of yours, but I was utterly disappointed by the lead actress of Mulan, Liu Yifei, due to her personal speech on promoting violence towards civilians of Hong Kong.

In Liu Yifei’s Weibo, she posted picture showing support to Hong Kong Police, who overly abuse their power towards protestors, and shooting bullets to first aider & reporter’s head, causing severe injury, which also a War Crime. Also, there were credible evidence showing Police cooperated with triads to attack civilians indiscriminately, shall be called Terrorist Attack by definition.

As a peaceful citizen, we shall take no tolerance on violence, and whoever promotes violence, like Liu Yifei. I sincerely ask you to take further actions towards Liu Yifei’s speech and violation of humanity.

Thank you!

Dear Disney Movies,

I’m such a big fan of yours, but I was utterly disappointed by the lead actress of Mulan, Liu Yifei, due to her personal speech on promoting violence towards civilians of Hong Kong.

In Liu Yifei’s Weibo, she posted picture showing support to Hong Kong Police, who overly abuse their power towards protestors, and shooting bullets to first aider & reporter’s head, causing severe injury, which also a War Crime. Also, there were credible evidence showing Police cooperated with triads to attack civilians indiscriminately, shall be called Terrorist Attack by definition.

As a peaceful citizen, we shall take no tolerance on violence, and whoever promotes violence, like Liu Yifei. I sincerely ask you to take further actions towards Liu Yifei’s speech and violation of humanity.

Thank you!
